productDisplayName: Nike Men Toki Canvas Grey Casual Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these nike Tonki canvas shoes are perfect for you. Designed for the super-stylish, these shoes have a great colour combination of grey and black. Featuring texture and overlay details and mid-height ankle, the nike Tonki shoes are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Canvas upper for a great casual look and durability Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Highly padded mesh collar for all-day comfort Contrast panel on heel for great casual style Embroidered branding on back heel and brand tab on tongue Midsole Autoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Outsole Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for superior grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
